ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the university is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the university */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case report */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university reporting the cases */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of reported COVID-19 cases */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the cases were reported */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the cases were reported */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reported the cases */,
  "reported_symptoms" TEXT /* Reported symptoms of the cases (e.g., fever, cough) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the case summary record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university associated with the summary */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported to date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the summary was updated */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_summary_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, reporter) */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university the user is affiliated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case report associated with the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case report associated with the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., pdf, jpg) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_files_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)
